description_long: This object is a stylized flower with six broad, textured petals arranged in a radial pattern around a pale yellow central disk. The petals are a muted red color and have a slightly rough, matte finish, giving them a naturalistic appearance. The center of the flower is dome-shaped and contrasts with the petals in both color and texture. A single, slightly curved, dark green stem extends downward from the base of the flower, providing support. No leaves are visible on or near the stem, emphasizing the simplicity of the design. The overall form is compact and ideal for decorative placement in urban parks, gardens, or sidewalk planters.
description: A stylized red flower with six broad petals and a pale yellow center, supported by a single dark green stem. The petals are arranged radially and have a slightly rough, matte texture.
description_view_0: The flower is seen from an angled side view, highlighting the overlapping red petals and the curved stem beneath.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view shows the symmetrical radial arrangement of the six petals around the pale yellow center.
description_view_2: Another angled side view, similar to view 0, but from the opposite direction, showing the petal layering and stem curvature.
description_view_3: A straight-on side view emphasizes the flatness of the flower's top and the vertical alignment of the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration around the central disk, with each petal evenly spaced and slightly overlapping at the base, creating a symmetrical and circular floral display.
